theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

verdicts.name: Super Micro
verdicts.note: AI 서버 OEM, NVDA 출하 직접 지표
verdicts.label: ACCUMULATE

narrative.summary: Super Micro: 정량 종합 69점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 48 / 중기 74 / 장기 78. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 약과열
overheat.guidance: 분할매수만. 한 번에 들어가지 말고 1/3~1/2씩 나눠서.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 8.1% → 2-ATR 손절폭 16.2%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 200MA, Value Area High. 현재가 대비 +18.4% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $35.89 아래 손절가 $30.42 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Talks
top_news.summary: Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations and led President Donald Trump to appeal for de-escalation.

top_news.title: Rare-Earth Developer Aclara Seeks US Backing for Chile Mine
top_news.summary: The company seeking to build Chile’s first rare-earth mine is in talks with US International Development Finance Corporation as the Trump administration moves to loosen China’s grip on critical minerals.

top_news.title: Asian Stocks Set to Rebound on Iran, AI Optimism: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Asian stocks are set to rebound from their biggest drop since March, tracking gains on Wall Street, while oil was steady as Iran and Israel pledged to ease strikes that threatened peace talks in the Middle East.

top_news.title: Fmr. Modell’s CEO on New York Knicks ‘Feeding Frenzy'
top_news.summary: Mitchell Modell, former CEO of Modell's Sporting Goods and partner at Versa NYC, discussed the significant economic impact the New York Knicks have on the city, especially during the NBA Finals. Modell described the intense excitement and high demand for bar space surrounding the games. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: NY Knicks Success a Win for Lenders Who Propped Up Broadcaster
top_news.summary: Just a year before the New York Knicks rode a double-digit winning streak to the NBA Finals, the company that broadcasts its games was thrown a lifeline to avoid a potential bankruptcy filing. Now, the lenders who backed that restructuring are likely cheering on the team’s success.

top_news.title: OpenAI Filed Confidentially for IPO as Rivals Race to Market
top_news.summary: OpenAI, the maker of ChatGPT, filed confidentially for an IPO, joining artificial intelligence rivals in tapping public markets to fund ambitious growth plans.

top_news.title: NYNJ FIFA Chief on How Fans Can Get to MetLife Stadium for the Games
top_news.summary: Alex Lasry, Chief Executive Officer of the NYNJ Host Committee for the FIFA World Cup 2026, says the region is ready for the tournament and contingency plans are in place for any transportation issues that arise.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
top_news.summary: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Bitcoin’s $235 Billion Crash Masks Bigger Shift in Crypto
top_news.summary: The easiest way to understand crypto used to be to look at Bitcoin.

top_news.title: Ingredion CEO Says Tate & Lyle Deal Creates Powerhouse
top_news.summary: Ingredion Inc. agreed to buy Tate & Lyle Plc for £2.7 billion ($3.6 billion), and will end the UK company’s near-century listing on the London Stock Exchange. Ingredion Chief Executive Officer James Zallie says the US company paid a "fair" premium and this deal creates an ingredients "powerhouse." He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
